decks.name: LMSW Exam Prep (ASWB Masters)
decks.description: Original study cards for the ASWB Masters exam, organized by the official 2026 blueprint (exams on or after August 3, 2026): Values and Ethics (35%), Assessment and Planning (33%), Intervention and Practice (32%). Covers the NASW Code of Ethics, human development and practice theories, DSM-5-TR diagnoses, psychotropic medications, abuse and neglect, interventions from CBT to community organizing, research, and supervision. Written from the public ASWB content outline; not affiliated with or endorsed by ASWB.
